creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
py-salt 3000 has been released quite some time ago and in the meanwhile 3000.1 has been released with lots of bugfixes. We run 3000.1 for quite some time on our Linux boxes and it works pretty well. Therefore i think the port should be updated to 3000.1 really soon.

v3000.1 Release notes: https://docs.saltstack.com/en/master/topics/releases/3000.1.html

v3000 Release notes: https://docs.saltstack.com/en/master/topics/releases/3000.html


The following information about py-crypto refers to bug #245411 - https://docs.saltstack.com/en/master/topics/releases/3000.html#security-advisory
I think this should not yet be taken care of and should be taken care off with the v3001 release (see link in the other bug).
